name: Toypedo Bandits New Color - Sunsquad™
description:
Dive into fun with the toypedo bandits from Sun Squad™. These colorful dive toys are perfect for pool games, offering a playful challenge for swimmers. Made from PVC, each piece is designed to glide smoothly through water, making them a hit with kids and adults alike. With four pieces in a set, they're great for group play or solo practice, adding excitement to any pool day.

Sun Squad™: Ready for fun.
